src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Removed the RestTemplate bean definition as it is no longer used in the application.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Deleted the @Bean method returning new RestTemplate()

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Changed bean methods from public to package-private to reduce visibility scope.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Removed 'public' modifier from facesServletRegistration, servletContextInitializer, and jsfConfigureListener methods

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Reordered import statements to follow a specific coding style or tool configuration.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Moved ConfigureListener import to top and removed RestTemplate import

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Adjusted line wrapping for method arguments to comply with code formatting rules.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.human_impl: Wrapped setInitParameter call across multiple lines

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Replace legacy java.text.SimpleDateFormat with java.time.DateTimeFormatter for thread-safe date formatting.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.human_impl: import java.time.LocalDateTime; import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter; private static final DateTimeFormatter FORMATTER = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss");

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Rename method from Spanish 'consultarSismos' to English 'searchEarthquakes' for consistency.
Adjust log statement formatting to comply with code style rules (likely Spotless).
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.human_impl: log.info("Can not perform search if days are not in range [0,30], current value: {}", calcDays);

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Convert synchronous service call to reactive subscribe pattern.
Update date conversion logic to use java.time API instead of legacy Date/TimeZone.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Convert mutable instance field to immutable static final constant to improve thread safety and adhere to best practices.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.human_impl: Changed 'DecimalFormat df' to 'private static final DecimalFormat DF' and updated usage in getMag().

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/domain.general_idea: Replace separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Converted the concrete service class into an interface to define the contract without implementation details.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed `public class EarthquakeService` to `public interface EarthquakeService` and removed all fields and methods.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed dependency on Spring Web's RestTemplate and related HTTP utilities.
Removed dependency on legacy Java date/time APIs.
Removed dependency on Lombok for logging.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Removed import for `lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j` and the `@Slf4j` annotation.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Added dependency on Project Reactor for reactive programming support.
Updated the earthquake count query method to return a reactive Mono instead of a blocking object.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed return type of `earthquakeCountQuery` from `EarthquakeCount` to `Mono<EarthquakeCount>`.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed the concrete implementation logic for querying earthquakes.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Removed the body of `earthquakeQuery` and `earthquakeCountQuery` methods, leaving only signatures in the interface.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed private helper methods used for date formatting and parameter construction.
Removed static constants defining the USGS API URLs and parameters.
Removed the constructor and initialization logic for the RestTemplate headers.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Removed the `@Autowired` constructor and the `initRestConsumption` method.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group standard library, project, and third-party imports separately.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.human_impl: Moved java.util imports to the top, followed by com.gsdd imports, then lombok, and finally org.primefaces imports.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.general_idea: Remove unnecessary trailing blank line at the end of the file.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.human_impl: Deleted the empty line after the closing brace of the class.
